name: moss-workspace
description: Moss open-source workspace: runtime, agent, memory, skills, teaching, and scaffolding packages.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run test -w @rdk-moss/core && npm run test -w @rdk-moss/memory && npm run test -w @rdk-moss/skills && npm run test -w @rdk-moss/agent && npm run test -w @rdk-moss/teaching && npm run test -w create-dmoss-app
scripts.verify: npm run check:boundaries && npm run check:hygiene && npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
